title: InterferenceRecord
description: Records concurrent events and assesses separability for a given observation window.

separability_status.description: Precise separability assessment. 'insufficient_inventory' means we lack data to make a call.

collision_set.description: List of concurrent events within the observation window. Empty list must be explicit (not absence).

alternative_explanations.description: At least one plausible alternative explanation for the observed price movement.

coverage_insufficiency.description: True if the collision set is likely incomplete due to monitoring gaps. Must not be represented as 'no other events'.
